zh.Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英國巴金哈姆爾沃頓 安德伍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Hadlow於大約1314年出生在英國肯特托布利其時，他的父親Sir John Hadlow46歲，母親Joan FitzNigel39歲。他於1330年12月16日與Isabella de St. Armand在英國越可爾赫爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年12月14日在英國英格蘭肯特哈德洛福享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾赫爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Hadlow于大约1314年出生在英国肯特托布利其时，他的父亲Sir John Hadlow46岁，母亲Joan FitzNigel39岁。他于1330年12月16日与Isabella de St. Armand在英国越可爾赫爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1342年12月14日在英国英格兰肯特哈德洛福享年29岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾赫爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hadlow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hadlow in Kent. The placename derives from Old English hāth ‘heath’ or hēafod ‘head’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Adley
meanings: English: probably a variant of Hadlow , with loss of initial H- and modification of the final syllable. Another, less likely, possibility is that it is a variant of Hadley .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Hadlow was born about 1314, in Tonbridge, Kent, England, his father, Sir John Hadlow, was 46 and his mother, Joan FitzNigel, was 39. He married Isabella de St. Armand on 16 December 1330, in Hull, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 14 December 1342, in Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Hadlow est né environ 1314, à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hadlow, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzNigel, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de St. Armand le 16 décembre 1330, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1342, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Hadlow um 1314 in Tonbridge, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hadlow 46 und seine Mutter Joan FitzNigel 39. Er hat am 16. Dezember 1330 in Hull, Yorkshire, England Isabella de St. Armand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1342 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Hadlow è nato il circa 1314 nel Tonbridge, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hadlow, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Joan FitzNigel, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de St. Armand il 16 dicembre 1330, nel Hull, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 dicembre 1342, nel Hadlow, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Hull, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Hadlowが約1314年にイギリスケントトンブリッジで生まれた時，父Sir John Hadlowは46歳，母Joan FitzNigelは39歳であった。1330年12月16日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルでIsabella de St. Armandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1342年12月14日にイギリスイギリスケントハドロウで29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Hadlow(이)가 대략 1314년 영국 켄트 토브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hadlow(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan FitzNigel(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1330년 12월 16일 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 Isabella de St. Armand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 12월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하들로에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 훌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Hadlow nasceu aproximadamente 1314, em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hadlow, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzNigel, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de St. Armand em 16 de dezembro de 1330, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1342, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Hadlow родился около 1314 г. в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hadlow было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzNigel, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de St. Armand 16 декабря 1330 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 декабря 1342 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Hadlow nació aproximadamente 1314, en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hadlow, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Joan FitzNigel, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Isabella de St. Armand el 16 de diciembre de 1330, en Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1342, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
